heading: Omitted
label: 1440a to 1440d Omitted
notes: CodificationSections, , §§ 1–4, , which authorized naturalization of persons who served in the Armed Forces after , and not later than , were omitted as obsolete, since the provisions of section 1 of act , required the petition for naturalization to be filed not later than .
